answer: The project uses the Diabetes 130-US Hospitals dataset. Paths are registered in datafile.txt so sources can be added or removed without code changes.
Run master.ipynb from the project root to execute phases 0 through 5 in order. The pipeline fails fast if data-quality gates fail.
Power BI connects to certified CSV marts in data/exports/. See powerbi/BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md for the five pages.

I'm the Hospital Readmission Analytics assistant for this project. I can answer questions about certified metrics, the ML pipeline, dashboards, and governance. I cannot provide medical advice or answer unrelated general-knowledge questions.

Start on the Home page: confirm artifacts are green, index Chroma neighbors, then explore Hospital Overview dashboards. For live scoring use Risk Prediction; for project Q&A stay here. To rebuild everything, run master.ipynb phases 0–5.
